recommendations.title: Winterkartoffelknödel
recommendations.overview: A policeman suspects that several bizarre deaths in the same family were murders and that the killer is a mysterious woman who just moved to the village.

recommendations.title: Schweinskopf al dente
recommendations.overview: As he tries to win back his ex-girlfriend, a lethargic Lower Bavarian police officer gets sidetracked by a panicky boss and an escaped psychopath.

recommendations.title: Sauerkrautkoma
recommendations.overview: When a hilariously dull policeman moves in with his best buddy in Munich, he has to deal with scandals, a corpse — and potential marriage.

recommendations.title: Leberkäsjunkie
recommendations.overview: While dealing with a burnt-down house, smelly diapers and brutal lack of sleep, a Lower Bavarian police officer faces his worst adversary: cholesterol.

recommendations.title: The Dumpling Affair
recommendations.overview: After a provincial policeman gets falsely accused of a crime that was committed with his pocket knife, he begins a turbulent hunt for the real murderer.

recommendations.title: Raising Arizona
recommendations.overview: When a childless couple—an ex-con and an ex-cop—take one of a wealthy family’s quintuplets to raise as their own, their lives grow more complicated than anticipated.

recommendations.title: Lesson Plan
recommendations.overview: After a teacher dies, his best friend — a former cop — takes a job at the school where he worked to confront the gang he thinks was responsible.

recommendations.title: Love Untangled
recommendations.overview: A lovestruck teen plans to win the school heartthrob by going from curly to straight hair — until a new transfer student changes everything.

recommendations.title: Counter Investigation
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates whether the man convicted of murdering his daughter is really guilty.

recommendations.title: Boys Don't Cry
recommendations.overview: A young aspiring violinist unwittingly becomes involved with a criminal gang.
